title: loncomelos creticum
intro: Loncomelos creticum, also known as Cretan daphne or daphne, is a flowering plant species in the family Thymelaeaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Loncomnulos creticum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Loncomelos creticum are typically made from its leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
